title: Database Entity
text: Database Entity A database entity is an Entity that has its DBMS Path property set to a connector path. It can be mapped to a database table, although it is not necessarily stored in a database. A database entity can be a Modeled Entity or a derived Component Entity . Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: ent Main Development Object?
